fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the responsibility center list code.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address associated with the responsibility center.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city where the responsibility center is located.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the responsibility center's phone number.

fields.name: Fax No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fax number of the responsibility center.

fields.name: Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you regularly contact.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location of the responsibility center.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the email address of the responsibility center.

fields.name: Home Page
fields.tooltip: Specifies the responsibility center's web site.
